# HELP node_uname_info Labeled system information as provided by the uname system call.
# TYPE node_uname_info gauge
node_uname_info{domainname="(none)",machine="x86_64",nodename="host1.binghamton.edu",release="5.14.0-362.8.1.el9_3.x86_64",sysname="Linux",version="#1 SMP PREEMPT_DYNAMIC Wed Sep 13"} 1
# HELP node_os_info A metric with a constant '1' value labeled by os information.
# TYPE node_os_info gauge
node_os_info{id="rocky",id_like="rhel centos fedora",name="Rocky Linux",pretty_name="Rocky Linux 9.3 (Blue Onyx)",version="9.3 (Blue Onyx)",version_codename="blue_onyx",version_id="9.3"} 1
# HELP node_dmi_info A metric with a constant '1' value labeled by dmi information.
# TYPE node_dmi_info gauge
node_dmi_info{bios_date="10/10/2023",bios_vendor="Dell Inc.",bios_version="2.18.1",board_vendor="Dell Inc.",chassis_vendor="Dell Inc.",product_name="PowerEdge R740",product_serial="ABC12345",product_uuid="4c4c4544-0042-4310-8033-c8c04f4d3032",system_vendor="Dell Inc."} 1
# HELP node_exporter_build_info A metric with a constant '1' value labeled by version, revision, branch, goversion from which node_exporter was built.
# TYPE node_exporter_build_info gauge
node_exporter_build_info{branch="HEAD",goarch="amd64",goos="linux",goversion="go1.22.5",revision="abc",tags="unknown",version="1.8.2"} 1
# HELP node_boot_time_seconds Node boot time, in unixtime.
# TYPE node_boot_time_seconds gauge
node_boot_time_seconds 1.7e+09
# HELP node_time_zone_offset_seconds System time zone offset in seconds.
# TYPE node_time_zone_offset_seconds gauge
node_time_zone_offset_seconds{time_zone="America/New_York"} -14400
# HELP node_memory_MemTotal_bytes Memory information field MemTotal_bytes.
# TYPE node_memory_MemTotal_bytes gauge
node_memory_MemTotal_bytes 1.34925033472e+11
# HELP node_cpu_seconds_total Seconds the CPUs spent in each mode.
# TYPE node_cpu_seconds_total counter
node_cpu_seconds_total{cpu="0",mode="idle"} 12345.6
node_cpu_seconds_total{cpu="0",mode="user"} 234.5
node_cpu_seconds_total{cpu="1",mode="idle"} 12340.0
node_cpu_seconds_total{cpu="1",mode="user"} 230.0
# HELP node_filesystem_size_bytes Filesystem size in bytes.
# TYPE node_filesystem_size_bytes gauge
node_filesystem_size_bytes{device="/dev/sda1",fstype="xfs",mountpoint="/"} 5.0e+11
node_filesystem_size_bytes{device="/dev/sda2",fstype="xfs",mountpoint="/var"} 1.0e+11
node_filesystem_size_bytes{device="tmpfs",fstype="tmpfs",mountpoint="/dev/shm"} 64000000
# HELP node_disk_filesystem_info Info about disk filesystem.
# TYPE node_disk_filesystem_info gauge
node_disk_filesystem_info{device="sda1",type="xfs",usage="filesystem",uuid="aaaa-1111",version=""} 1
node_disk_filesystem_info{device="sda2",type="xfs",usage="filesystem",uuid="bbbb-2222",version=""} 1
# HELP node_disk_info Info of /sys/block/<block_device>.
# TYPE node_disk_info gauge
node_disk_info{device="sda",major="8",minor="0",model="PERC H730P Mini",path="pci-0000:18:00.0-scsi-0:2:0:0",revision="4.30",serial="DEADBEEF",wwn="0x600508"} 1
node_disk_info{device="sdb",major="8",minor="16",model="PERC H730P Mini",path="pci-0000:18:00.0-scsi-0:2:1:0",revision="4.30",serial="CAFEBABE",wwn="0x600509"} 1
node_disk_info{device="dm-0",major="252",minor="0",model="",path="",revision="",serial="",wwn=""} 1
node_disk_info{device="loop0",major="7",minor="0",model="",path="",revision="",serial="",wwn=""} 1
# HELP node_network_address_info Node network address info.
# TYPE node_network_address_info gauge
node_network_address_info{address="10.0.1.5",device="eth0"} 1
node_network_address_info{address="10.0.1.6",device="eth1"} 1
# HELP node_network_info Network device info.
# TYPE node_network_info gauge
node_network_info{address="00:00:00:00:00:00",adminstate="up",broadcast="00:00:00:00:00:00",device="lo",duplex="",ifalias="",operstate="unknown"} 1
node_network_info{address="aa:bb:cc:dd:ee:01",adminstate="up",broadcast="ff:ff:ff:ff:ff:ff",device="eth0",duplex="full",ifalias="",operstate="up"} 1
node_network_info{address="aa:bb:cc:dd:ee:02",adminstate="up",broadcast="ff:ff:ff:ff:ff:ff",device="eth1",duplex="full",ifalias="",operstate="up"} 1
